zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina af Aagaard於1345年出生在丹麥維爾科爾丁時，她的父親Aagaard66歲，母親Martha Af Aagard65歲。她於大約1361年與Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm在丹麥迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina af Aagaard于1345年出生在丹麦維爾科爾丁时，她的父亲Aagaard66岁，母亲Martha Af Aagard65岁。她于大约1361年与Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm在丹麦迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aagaard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Aase, Erik, Knut, Morten.
Danish; Norwegian (also Ågård): habitational name meaning ‘farm by a stream’, a compound of å (old spelling aa) ‘stream, small river’ and gård (old spelling gaard) ‘farm’. Compare Aagard and Agard .

variants.name: Agard
meanings: Danish and Norwegian (Ågård): variant of Aagaard .
French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements agi(n) ‘edge’ (specifically ‘edge of a sword’, hence a synonym of ‘sword’) + hard ‘hardy, bold’.
English: possibly a variant of Agar , or alternatively of Haggard with loss of initial H-.

variants.name: Aagard
meanings: Altered form of Danish and Norwegian Aagaard or Ågård (see Agard ).

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

nameMeanings.name: af
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Christina af Aagaard was born in 1345, in Kolding, Vejle, Denmark, her father, Aagaard, was 66 and her mother, Martha Af Aagard, was 65. She married Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm about 1361, in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1388, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina af Aagaard est née en 1345, à Kolding, Vejle, Danemark, son père, Aagaard, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Martha Af Aagard, avait 65 ans. Elle a épousé Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm environ 1361, à Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina af Aagaard 1345 in Kolding, Vejle, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aagaard 66 und ihre Mutter Martha Af Aagard 65. Sie hat um 1361 in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dänemark Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1388 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina af Aagaard è nata il nel 1345 nel Kolding, Vejle, Danimarca, sua padre, Aagaard, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, Martha Af Aagard, aveva 65 anni. Lei sposato Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm circa 1361, nel Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1388, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina af Aagaardが1345年にデンマークベジルコルディングで生まれた時，父Aagaardは66歳，母Martha Af Aagardは65歳であった。約1361年にデンマークスイステドベスター ハンケットルップでNiels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina af Aagaard(이)가 1345년 덴마크 브j일 콜딩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aagaard(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Af Aagard(은)는 65세였다. 그녀는 대략 1361년 덴마크 스이스테드 베스터 핸 케트루프에서 Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina af Aagaard nasceu em 1345, em Kolding, Vejle, Dinamarca, seu pai, Aagaard, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Martha Af Aagard, tinha 65 anos. Ela casou-se com Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm aproximadamente 1361, em Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1388, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina af Aagaard родилась в 1345 г. в местности колдинг, веджл, Дания, её отцу по имени Aagaard было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Af Aagard, 65. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm около 1361 г. в местности кеттруп, вестир хань, тистед, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1388 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina af Aagaard nació en 1345, en Kolding, Vejle, Dinamarca, su papá, Aagaard, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Martha Af Aagard, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm aproximadamente 1361, en Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1388, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
